scripts.dev: node scripts/scan-arabic-corruption.cjs --warn-only --report reports/arabic-corruption-report.txt && npx concurrently "npm run server:dev" "vite"
scripts.server:dev: set DB_DIALECT=postgres&& set DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:12345678@127.0.0.1:5432/shamel_erp_pg&& set PG_DATABASE_NAME=shamel_erp_pg&& set QR_MENU_PORT=0&& node scripts/ensure-port-free.cjs 3111 && tsx watch backend/server.ts
scripts.server:pg: set DB_DIALECT=postgres&& set DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:12345678@127.0.0.1:5432/shamel_erp_pg&& set PG_DATABASE_NAME=shamel_erp_pg&& set QR_MENU_PORT=0&& node scripts/ensure-port-free.cjs 3111 && tsx watch backend/server.ts

scripts.build:lan: node scripts/scan-arabic-corruption.cjs --warn-only --report reports/arabic-corruption-report.txt && tsc && vite build --mode lan
scripts.build: npm run scan:arabic && tsc && vite build
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run build && node scripts/cap-sync-android.cjs && npx cap sync android

scripts.lan:host:start: npm run build:lan && npm run server:pg:lan
scripts.electron:dev: node scripts/stop-dev-processes.cjs && node scripts/ensure-port-free.cjs 5173 && node scripts/ensure-port-free.cjs 3222 && npm run clean && npm run build:dev && npm run build:electron-main && npm run db:pg:check && npx concurrently -k "npm run dev" "npm run dev:qr" "npx wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:3222 && node scripts/run-electron-dev.cjs"
scripts.electron:dev:rebuild: node scripts/stop-dev-processes.cjs && node scripts/ensure-port-free.cjs 5173 && node scripts/ensure-port-free.cjs 3222 && npm run clean && npm run native:rebuild && npm run build:dev && npm run build:electron-main && npm run db:pg:check && npx concurrently -k "npm run dev" "npm run dev:qr" "npx wait-on http-get://127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:3222 && node scripts/run-electron-dev.cjs"
scripts.electron:build: taskkill /F /IM Shamel-ERP.exe /T 2>nul & taskkill /F /IM electron.exe /T 2>nul & taskkill /F /IM app-builder.exe /T 2>nul & timeout /t 2 /nobreak >nul & npm run version:bump && npm run icon:convert && npm run clean && npm run native:rebuild && npm run build && npm run build:server && npm run build:electron-main && npm run fix:electron && node scripts/electron-build.cjs
